name: dnstt-worker

DNSTT_DOMAIN.description: Your DNS tunnel domain (e.g., `t.example.com`). This must match the NS record you configured.

DNSTT_PRIVKEY.description: Server private key (64 hex chars). Generate with: `./dnstt-server -gen-key`

DNSTT_UPSTREAM.description: Upstream HTTP endpoint for tunnel traffic (e.g., `https://your-server.com/tunnel`). Leave empty if not needed.

DNSTT_MTU.description: Maximum DNS response payload size. Default `1232` works for most resolvers. Use `512` for maximum compatibility.

description: dnstt DNS tunnel server running as a Cloudflare Worker (DoH endpoint)
